targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE payload->>'has_sop' = 'true') * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) as sop_hit_rate FROM audit_log WHERE audit_type = 'prompt' AND started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
SELECT started_at, (payload->>'kb_chunks_count')::int as chunks FROM audit_log WHERE audit_type = 'prompt' AND started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY started_at
SELECT (payload->>'total_token_est')::int as tokens FROM audit_log WHERE audit_type = 'prompt' AND payload->>'total_token_est' IS NOT NULL AND started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'

SELECT cb->>'name' as segment, SUM((cb->>'chars')::int) as total_chars FROM audit_log, jsonb_array_elements(payload->'context_breakdown') as cb WHERE audit_type = 'prompt' AND started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY cb->>'name'

panels.title: 最近 Prompt 审计记录详情

targets.rawSql: SELECT id, started_at, conversation_id, payload->>'case_id' as case_id, payload->>'assistant_type' as assistant_type, payload->>'has_sop' as has_sop, payload->>'kb_chunks_count' as kb_chunks, payload->>'kb_top_score' as kb_score, payload->>'total_token_est' as tokens, payload->>'total_chars' as chars, CASE WHEN payload->'messages' IS NOT NULL THEN 'sampled' ELSE 'null' END as messages_status FROM audit_log WHERE audit_type = 'prompt' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: 完整 Prompt Messages（仅采样记录）

targets.rawSql: SELECT id, started_at, payload->>'case_id' as case_id, jsonb_pretty(payload->'messages') as full_messages FROM audit_log WHERE audit_type = 'prompt' AND payload->'messages' IS NOT NULL ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 5
